chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-3027 of 2025 Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) For hearing of main case. 21.08.2025. None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, APG Sindh. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. Since the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government of Sindh and a proviso for bail has been inserted in the Act, as such, an alternate remedy is now provided, therefore, this petition is disposed of. The petitioner is at liberty to approach the trial Court for appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Farooq ps
